summary: Priority-aware HTTP request orchestration for mobile/offline-sensitive scenarios, often paired with punchclock.
recommendedPatterns: Use Fusillade when request prioritization or deduplication is a real product requirement.
Pair it with Akavache when offline cache behavior matters.
avoidPatterns: Do not add Fusillade for trivial API access.
Do not hide prioritization rules in scattered call sites.
setupSteps: Define priority-aware HTTP clients or handlers.
Integrate with caching only when justified.
commonPitfalls: Forgetting that Fusillade policy should be visible at the composition root.

harvest.sourceSummary: Curated from local ReactiveUI repositories, official GitHub documentation, and current SDK/package guidance.
harvest.notes: Prepared for the ReactiveUI MCP Server knowledge catalog.
